Secondary direct beach sources support organized/deep-water static context: i-lovegreece describes the Sergoula beach as pebbly, organized with loungers and umbrellas, and deep-water. The official Blue Flag beach page confirms the 2026 Sergoula award in Fokida / Dorida / Efpalio and lists Dorida Municipality as manager. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; unsupported parking/canteen specificity and asphalt-road certainty were removed.
